user_query: What did James learn to make in the chemistry class besides omelette and meringue?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "James")]/Session[atom(content =~ "chemistry class cooking")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "learn make") and not(atom(content =~ "omelette")) and not(atom(content =~ "meringue"))])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "James")]/Session[atom(content =~ "chemistry class cooking")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "learn make") and not(atom(content =~ "omelette")) and not(atom(content =~ "meringue"))]
